ab: Meban, wa cu mungi maras bbrwan mu la, syugay mu cikah ’ra su ga?
ch: W:Meban，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Meban, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: ungat kinang uyi, ’ra Habaw kwani.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Habaw’s.

ab: syugay mu cikah ga? helaw ci bi’an misu.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ang rasi.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: mhway su, mhway su say kya Habaw uyi.
en: Thank you and thank Habaw for me.

ab: lalu siyun su?
en: May I help you?

ab: mwa cu smatu sa’ing biru hani.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: aw, lalu siyun su loyi?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: mosa cu ksiyu tugan biru hani loyi.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: aw la, kya yngiy tugan ryax lga wahiy smatu la.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ini caku bi’iy ccong maku nya.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: wayan misu bi’an hesa la ha.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: ca ini texi ccong maku la?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了？
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: kya su waya syugan Sabuw la.
en: Did you lend it to Sabuw?

ab: ini mu ba’i, halan mu kmayan heya ha.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: syugay misu ccong mu ha.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Habaw, oba hani ga syugan su nya Piho?
en: Habaw, did Piho lend you this coat?

ab: iyat, mnayi cu nya yaya mu.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: tna ci oba mamu, cimu Piho.
en: Piho’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: mkalux oba nya ku heya, ini tna pnatas myan.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Xumi, wayan su syugan pila Wilang?
en: Xumi, did you borrow money from Wilang?

ab: ang, obeh maku halan smatu soni la, mungi cu maras pila la.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: nanu knwan halan su smatu?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: cuxan halan mu smatu.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: aw, kyalun maku Wilang haca.
en: Okay, I will tell Wilang for you.
